# IK Foam Pro 2+ Sprayer 64 oz 

No longer do you need a pressure washer to foam your vehicle; all you need is the IK Foam Sprayers! These sprayers were specifically manufactured for foaming and cleaning applications and can be used with a wide variety of cleaning formulas.

The IK Foam Pro 2+ sprayer provides the user a dense and durable foam suitable for cleaning and disinfecting upholstery and carpets and foaming the exterior of your vehicle. In a particularly advantageous way, the Foam Pro 2+ sprayer has a compressed air connector, an inlet valve located in the sprayer head that allows the insertion of air into the tank thanks to its universal Schrader valve for connectors worldwide.

Designed for use with chemical agents with surfactant properties (surface active). Dilute your favorite APC, car wash soap, or iron remover depending on the task at hand. Provided with the sprayer are 3 color coded adaptors for different types of foam production (dry, wet, or standard foam). 

### Features: 

- Resistant to most acids and solvents (pH 1-11, Check [Chemical Product Table](https://www.iksprayers.com/en/chemical-product-table)).

- 3 bar safety valve with depressurization option. 

- Large opening for easy filling and cleaning. 

- Innovative and ergonomic design.

- Strong translucent tank with level indicator. 

- Base for greater stability.

- Safety lock.

- Protective sleeve for valve chamber. 

- Compressed air connector for easy pressurizing.

- Easy assembly and taking apart for cleaning and maintenance, tool free. 

- Special foam even fan type nozzle.

- Color coded caps included to identify contents of sprayer and for nozzle storage.

- Comes with three (3) Color-Coded Mixer Adaptors! Creates your choice of dry, wet, OR standard foam.

- Orange: Very wet foam

- Green: Very dry foam

- Grey: Standard foam 

### Specifications: 

- Maximum pressure: 3 bar 43.5 psi

- Net weight: 1.54 lb

- Gross weight: 1.23 lb

- Useful capacity: 42 oz (1.25 L)

- Total capacity: 64 oz (1.9 L) 

**Can be used with products such as: **

- CARPRO [Reset](https://www.carpro-us.com/wash/?_bc_fsnf=1&brand=10&Arrival=2014)

- CARPRO [Descale](https://www.carpro-us.com/deep-cleanse/?_bc_fsnf=1&brand=10&Step=Clean&Arrival=2021)

- CARPRO [Hydro2 Foam](https://www.carpro-us.com/wash/?_bc_fsnf=1&Step=Protect&brand=10&Tech=Nano+Sealant)

- CARPRO [MultiX](https://www.carpro-us.com/deep-cleanse/prep-wash/carpro-multi-x-all-purpose-cleaner-concentrate-500ml-17oz/) - Limited 

- CARPRO [Lift](https://www.carpro-us.com/latest-arrivals/carpro-lift-snow-foam-500ml-17oz/) - Limited

- CARPRO [Cleanse](https://www.carpro-us.com/interior/carpro-cleanse-leather-cleaner-500ml-17oz/)

- CARPRO [Inside](https://www.carpro-us.com/interior/carpro-inside-cleaner-concentrate-500ml-17oz/) - Limited

- CARPRO [IronX Snow Soap](https://www.carpro-us.com/iron-removal/?_bc_fsnf=1&Arrival=2013&Tech=Decontaminate) - Limited

- CARPRO [Spotless](https://www.carpro-us.com/water-spot-removal/?_bc_fsnf=1&Arrival%5B%5D=2014&Arrival%5B%5D=2022) - Limited

- Koch Chemie [Gentle Snow Foam](https://www.carpro-us.com/deep-cleanse/koch-chemie-gentle-snow-foam-1l/)

- [Koch Chemie Green Star](https://www.carpro-us.com/holiday-steals/koch-chemie-green-star-1l/) - Limited

- [Koch Chemie Pol Star](https://www.carpro-us.com/interior/koch-chemie-pol-star-1l/) - Limited

- [Oberk All Purpose Soap](https://www.carpro-us.com/deep-cleanse/oberk-all-purpose-soap-8-oz/) - Limited

- [Oberk Foam Wash](https://www.carpro-us.com/oberk/oberk-foam-wash-32-oz-new/?searchid=1922304&search_query=)

- [OBSSSSD Auto Wash](https://www.carpro-us.com/car-wash-shampoo/?_bc_fsnf=1&brand=39)

- [Ultima Paint Guard Wash](https://www.carpro-us.com/car-wash-shampoo/?_bc_fsnf=1&brand=13)

- [Car Candy Bubblicious](https://www.carpro-us.com/carcandy/bubblicious-hyper-concentrated-vehicle-wash-new-phuy/?searchid=1922304&search_query=)

- [Car Candy Revive](https://www.carpro-us.com/wash/car-candy-revive-ph-neutral-soap-new/?searchid=1922305&search_query=)

- [Dr. Beasley's Matte Body Wash](https://www.carpro-us.com/wash/dr-beasleys-matte-body-wash-12-oz/?searchid=1922306&search_query=)

- [BioWorx Natural Auto Soap](https://www.carpro-us.com/wash/bioworx-natural-auto-soap-16-oz-new/)

***Not for use** with** products such as:*** 

- CARPRO [Retyre](https://www.carpro-us.com/cleaning/?_bc_fsnf=1&Surface=Rubber&brand=10) (Recommended foaming sprayer: [IK Alkaline Foam Pro 2](https://www.carpro-us.com/brushes-bottles-applicators/ik-foam-pro-2-alkaline-50-oz-sprayer-new/?searchid=1922309&search_query=), [IK Alkaline Foam Pro 12](https://www.carpro-us.com/brushes-bottles-applicators/ik-foam-pro-12-alkaline-2-gallon-sprayer/?searchid=1922309&search_query=), [CARPRO ReTyre EMPTY 500ml Bottle](https://www.carpro-us.com/brushes-bottles-applicators/carpro-retyre-empty-500ml-bottle-with-foaming-spray-trigger/) or [SOLO CLEANLine Alkaline Foaming Sprayer](https://www.carpro-us.com/latest-arrivals/solo-cleanline-alkaline-foaming-sprayer-1-25-liter-new/))

- CARPRO [Bug-Out](https://www.carpro-us.com/deep-cleanse/carpro-bug-out-insect-removal-500ml-17-oz/) (Recommended sprayer: [IK Multi TR 1](https://www.carpro-us.com/brushes-bottles-applicators/ik-multi-tr-1-heavy-duty-sprayer-35-oz/) or [IK Alkaline](https://www.carpro-us.com/brushes-bottles-applicators/ik-alkaline-1-5-sprayer-35-oz/))

- CARPRO [TarX](https://www.carpro-us.com/daily-deals/carpro-tar-x-500ml-17-oz/) (Recommended sprayer:[IK HC TR 1 Heavy Duty Sprayer 35 oz](https://www.carpro-us.com/brushes-bottles-applicators/ik-hc-tr-1-heavy-duty-sprayer-35-oz/))

- CARPRO [Trix](https://www.carpro-us.com/deep-cleanse/carpro-trix-tar-iron-remover-500ml-17oz/) (Recommended sprayer:[IK HC TR 1 Heavy Duty Sprayer 35 oz](https://www.carpro-us.com/brushes-bottles-applicators/ik-hc-tr-1-heavy-duty-sprayer-35-oz/))

### Instructions:

- Unscrew the sprayer head by turning it anti-clockwise.

- Fill the tank with water to the indicated maximum of 1,25L 42 oz.

- Pour the foaming product.

- Screw tightly to close.

- Pressurize the device using strokes (approx. 15). For a good quality foam it is important to pressurize until the valve clicks or pops out.

- To begin spraying, make sure the safety lock is off. Press the handle and, as you work, compensate for the loss in pressure by making more passes.

- Once the work is finished, activate the safety lock and release the pressure by pulling the safety valve.

- If more than one appliance is used with different chemicals, use the identification marker to identify the contents of each appliance by placing it on the end of the handle. To remove it, pull it in the direction shown by the arrows using a tool or pointed instrument.

### Cleaning and Maintenance:

- After each use, depressurize the sprayer.

- Collect and dispose of the residual amount according to the legislation, prescriptions, and applicable regulations.

- Clean the appliance with water.

- In the event of obstruction of the nozzle, clean it with water and do not use metallic objects.

- In order to prolong the life of the joints, regularly apply some drops of oil or grease on the moving parts.

- To access the valve chamber, remove the cylinder guard by pulling it firmly.
